text:
AoTs3-PF2 is the 4th track on disc 2 of the "Attack on Titan" Season 3 Original Soundtrack.

As with all the other pre-The Final Season OSTs, it was composed and arranged by .

Title

"AoTs3" is an abbreviation of "Attack on Titan Season 3". Pf is an abbreviation of Piano/Pianoforte, which means that this is "Piano piece 2".

Musical motifs

The track is a piano arrangement of [[0Sk|SymphonicSuite[AoT]Part1-1st:0Sk]].

All occurrences

Episode 43 - Levi and Mikasa discuss their experiences as Ackermanns
Episode 47 - In a flashback, Kenny leaves Levi
Episode 57 - Grisha grows up while facing discrimination
Episode 59 - Opening recap
Special 2 and Episode 92 - Armin offers his response to Zeke's worldview
